---
title: "Pakages"
---

## updates

https://github.com/Anaconda-Platform/nb_conda_kernels#nb_conda_kernels

https://jupytext.readthedocs.io/en/latest/

https://stackoverflow.com/questions/69481608/cannot-set-up-a-conda-environment-with-python-3-10

https://blog.r-hub.io/2022/09/12/r-dependency/

https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/checkpoint/index.html

```{r}
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
tibble(x = 1:4) |> 
  mutate(y = x*2,
         z = x*3,)
```
